menu.name: Myths of Tubbyland
menu.desc: Options specific to Myths of Tubbyland

checkbox.name: Developer Editing
checkbox.desc: Enables/Disables 7 in the main menu to be used to open the editor

menu.name: Graphics Options
menu.desc: Options pertaining to graphical elements, such as borders

choice.name: Borders
choice.desc: ''DISABLED'' = Game plays at normal Aspect Ratio and has no special effects. Best if you want no distractions or if you don't like the effects. ''4:3'' = Forces the game into 4:3 Aspect Ratio. Best if you want the look without the extra effects. ''OVERLAY'' = Forces the game into 4:3 Aspect Ratio and adds a fancy border. Best if you want the full experience.

checkbox.name: Force Fullscreen
checkbox.desc: Forces the game into Fullscreen after every transition. RECOMMENDED

menu.name: Memes
menu.desc: WARNING: these will make the mod lose a lot of aura

checkbox.name: Shake it, Don't Stir
checkbox.desc: Big Winky Nocturnals on your Protocol
